name: &RB&rara&Rd&r-D&Ru&rr&n
description:
Nelde Cormar Eldaron Aranen nu i vilya,
Otso Heruin Naucoron ondeva mardentassen,
Nerte Firime Nerin yar i Nuron martyar,
Mine i More Herun mormahalmaryasse
Mornoreo Noresse yasse i Fuini caitar.
Mine Corma turie te ilye, Mine Corma hirie te,
Mine Corma hostie te ilye ar mordosse nutie te
Mornoreo Noresse yasse i Fuini caitar.
